example.vi: Chúng ta nên ăn uống lành mạnh.

definitions.es: El acto de comer y beber.
definitions.en: The act of eating and drinking.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ ở nhà hàng tối nay.

translation.en: We will eat at the restaurant tonight.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He likes going eating and drinking with friends on weekends.
She always pays attention to eating and drinking to stay healthy.
I think eating and drinking at this restaurant is very delicious and clean.
exampleSentences: Anh thích đi ăn uống với bạn bè vào cuối tuần.
Chị luôn chú ý đến việc ăn uống để giữ sức khỏe tốt.
Em thấy ăn uống ở nhà hàng này rất ngon và sạch sẽ.
notes:
ăn uống means eating and drinking in general, focusing on the whole activity, not just one meal. It’s about your food habits or going out to eat.

It’s a verb phrase, often used when talking about lifestyle, health, or social plans. You can combine it with words about place, people, or manner.

Close synonym: ẩm thực (more formal, about cuisine/food culture).
notes_md:
**ăn uống** means *eating and drinking* in general, focusing on the whole activity, not just one meal. It’s about your food habits or going out to eat.

It’s a verb phrase, often used when talking about lifestyle, health, or social plans. You can combine it with words about place, people, or manner.


Close synonym: **ẩm thực** (more formal, about cuisine/food culture).

content.sentence: Chúng ta có thể ___ ở công viên.

translation.en: We can eat in the park.
